name: Sidecar Search
description: Cmd-K replacement popup: fuzzy-ranked search over collections (incl. hidden), views, pages; inline New/Open/Settings/Create rows; per-collection sub-palette; date jump rows; Shift+Enter opens in other panel. Every native jump-palette open (buttons, swipe) is redirected here; commands stay in the native Cmd-P palette (type > or press the command shortcut to hand off). Escape hatch: the native jump-palette shortcut (default Cmd+Shift+P) opens true-native jump for the Tags pseudo-collection. Rebind via custom below (Mod = Cmd on macOS, Ctrl elsewhere; e.g. "Mod+Shift+K"). commandShortcut is the key that switches from this popup to native commands — keep it matching your launch_cmdpal binding.
